Aspose.PUB Convert Micro Application 26.2.0
Copyright 2001-2025 Aspose Pty Ltd

  -i, --input      Required. The path to the input document.

  -o, --output     Required. The path for the converted document.

  -f, --format     Defines the output document format.

  -l, --license    Specifies the path to the Aspose.PUB .NET license file.

  -v, --verbose    (Default: false) Enables verbose output for detailed logging.

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.
